reviews.review_description: I’ve tried a lot of the meditation apps. I really enjoyed that this one elegant and gives feedback. I’ve used mandalas for relaxation for years. I hope there are more to come in this app.

Given the amount of hustle and stress in this World, it is great to be able to use VR as an effective tool
for meditation, relaxation, and focus. Inner Focus uses the senses to create a relaxing environment with sight , binaural audio, and guided voiceover, to help the user to attain a state of relaxation to improve their mood and improve positive energy.
